verses.1: A Psalm of David. Hear my prayer, LORD, Listen to my pleadings! Answer me in Your faithfulness, in Your righteousness!
verses.2: And do not enter into judgment with Your servant, For no person living is righteous in Your sight.
verses.3: For the enemy has persecuted my soul; He has crushed my life to the ground; He has made me dwell in dark places, like those who have long been dead.
verses.4: Therefore my spirit feels weak within me; My heart is appalled within me.
verses.5: I remember the days of old; I meditate on all Your accomplishments; I reflect on the work of Your hands.
verses.6: I spread out my hands to You; My soul longs for You, like a weary land. Selah
verses.7: Answer me quickly, LORD, my spirit fails; Do not hide Your face from me, Or I will be the same as those who go down to the pit.
verses.8: Let me hear Your faithfulness in the morning, For I trust in You; Teach me the way in which I should walk; For to You I lift up my soul.
verses.9: Save me, LORD, from my enemies; I take refuge in You.
verses.10: Teach me to do Your will, For You are my God; Let Your good Spirit lead me on level ground.
verses.11: For the sake of Your name, LORD, revive me. In Your righteousness bring my soul out of trouble.
verses.12: And in Your faithfulness, destroy my enemies, And eliminate all those who attack my soul, For I am Your servant.
